name: Halloween Popcorn Grunch
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Banana chips, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, buttered bowl, combine the first four ingredients and set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, and water. Bring to a boil.
3. Cook, covered, for 3 minutes. Uncover and cook without stirring until the mixture reaches the hard-ball stage (260°F), about 4-5 minutes.
4. Add butter and vanilla. Stir continuously for 1 minute.
5. Pour the sugar mixture over the popcorn mixture and toss quickly to coat.
6. Turn the mixture out onto a greased baking sheet. Spread using buttered hands.
7. Cool and break into pieces.
Source: Vancouver Sun, October 26, 1994
From the collection of Karen Deck
